items.name: ROBLOX World Tour Lightning Guitar
items.description: ROBLOX is kicking off our world tour and it's gunna be loud!  This slammin' lighting guitar will send lightning at anyone nearby is you can play the notes just right.

items.name: Crystal Blade: Amethyst Attack
items.description: Use this mighty blade made of one of the world’s most revered stones to smash foes with style.

items.name: Police Badge
items.description: It's a tough job but someone has to do it.

items.name: Red Grind Skateboard
items.description: Red Grind 4 Lyfe!

items.name: Staff of Gloomy Grip
items.description: One click and a gloomy hand does your bidding. Tip - Try grabbing something with the staff and then walking!

items.name: Levitating Staff of the Cosmos
items.description: Send your enemies flying into the deepest regions of the Robloxian universe.

items.name: Compass
items.description: Never get lost in a cave or maze again with this handy compass. Always points due north. A must for tomb raiders everywhere.

items.name: Knight's Sword
items.description: Keep down the peasant uprisings with this gleaming longsword.

items.name: Robot Rock Guitar
items.description: Roboboogie. Hit keys: 'Z', 'X', 'C', 'V', 'B', 'N' to play different notes.

items.name: Fancy Skateboard
items.description: Who says skaters are slackers?  Not us!

items.name: Orinthian Electroslasher
items.description: Click to slash, dealing 16 to 20 damage. Hit the 'Q' key to spawn three Orinthian warrior minions in front of you, which will chase nearby enemies, dealing 10 damage per hit.

items.name: Wall Walker
items.description: I wish I could summon my own personal anywhere elevator in real life... Uphill is my least favorite direction

items.name: Bat Knight Bat Sword
items.description: You would think that you wouldn't need to use the word "Bat" so many times to name a sword.

items.name: 8-Bit Sword and Shield
items.description: It can be dangerous if you go it alone, you'd better take this.

items.name: Zombie Friend Fred
items.description: Friends don't let friends eat brains...so maybe Fred isn't exactly your friend...

items.name: Gear Recycler
items.description: Everything old is new again! Put a gear item in, get a gear item of similar type out!

items.name: Dual Monster Axes
items.description: Sling these at your foes to do some major damage! You'll do 12 to 17 damage when you slash you foes and 25 points on double slash!

items.name: Toxic Goo Trap
items.description: Encase your enemies in toxic goo for fun and profit!  Okay maybe just fun.

items.name: Wizards of the Astral Isles: Limb Stretching Spell
items.description: Use this ancient script to make your arms ridiculously long.  Then hit people with them!

items.name: Director's Clapboard
items.description: Aaaaand ACTION! Click to clap the boards and push enemies backwards!

items.name: Raig Chair
items.description: It's time for your foes to take a seat.... as they get hit by this chair!

items.name: Mythic Sword of the Earth
items.description: Protect Mother Earth with this mighty sword. Slash away at your enemies and leave behind a quaking trail of earth. 15 - 22 damage per swing. While the sword is equipped, the wielder leaves a trail of broken, quaking earth that causes anyone that steps on it to trip and fall.

items.name: Noxious Chocolate
items.description: Share this candy with your enemies.  Forces them to eat the candy (which is poisonous) and causes them to drop their weapons!

items.name: 4-String Roblocaster Premiere Guitar
items.description: ROBLOX Brings You...ROBLOX Brings You...ROBLOX Brings You... the most awesome electric guitar ever known to Robloxians!

items.name: Sword of the Raven's Feather
items.description: Light as a feather, sharp as a tack. Slash your foes with the dark power of the raven.

items.name: Ice Potion
items.description: It's a slippery slope with this potion.  Even if it's not a slope!

items.name: Gigantoform
items.description: Double your size and and tower over your opponents.

items.name: An Elegant Blade
items.description: From a more civilized time...

items.name: Festive Dueling Piano
items.description: One simple click will send this festive holiday piano crashing down from the sky and onto your target.  They'll get crushed and be unable to move while you play them a little holiday tune.

items.name: Telewarp
items.description: Leave a hologram of yourself and then telewarp back to it at any point!
